name: supabase-db-migrator
description: Connect Codex to Supabase and safely migrate this project's PostgreSQL data.

interface.shortDescription: Safe Postgres to Supabase migration helper
interface.longDescription: Adds the hosted Supabase MCP server in read-only mode and bundles a verified pg_dump/pg_restore workflow for moving this project's PostgreSQL data into a Supabase project with row-count checks.
defaultPrompt: Connect this repo to my Supabase project
Migrate my Postgres data into Supabase safely
Verify row counts after the Supabase restore
